note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left foot wound site, rates 2/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left foot measures 2.6 cm x 3.2 cm x 1.0 cm.
  Wound bed: 65% slough, 35% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: none.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left foot — improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Physician notified of wound progression.
